    Subinterfaces of AggregateReference in org.springframework.data.rest.core

    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    AssociationAggregateReference<T extends org.jmolecules.ddd.types.AggregateRoot<T,ID>, ID extends org.jmolecules.ddd.types.Identifier>
    An AggregateReference that can also resolve into jMolecules Association instances.
    Classes in org.springframework.data.rest.core that implement AggregateReference
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ResolvingAggregateReference<T,ID>
    An AggregateReference implementation that resolves the source URI given a Function or into a fixed value.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AggregateReference<T,ID>
    AggregateReference.withIdSource(Function<UriComponents, Object> extractor)
    Creates a new AggregateReference resolving the identifier source value from the given UriComponents.
